# Luxvibe

Luxvibe is a luxury hotel booking platform powered by LiteAPI.

## Overview

Luxvibe helps travelers discover and book luxury hotels worldwide. The platform provides access to 2 million+ hotels across 190+ countries with real-time availability and pricing.

## Key Features

- **Search & Discover** – Search by destination, dates, and guest count. Real-time availability and pricing across luxury properties globally.
- **Compare Hotels** – Side-by-side comparison of multiple properties to find the perfect fit.
- **AI-Generated Landmarks** – Visual guides to destinations with AI-generated city landmark imagery.
- **Interactive Maps** – Explore hotel locations with detailed mapping and neighborhood information.
- **Luxury Filters** – Curated filters for premium amenities, star ratings, and boutique experiences.
- **Book Directly** – Instant booking with real-time confirmation on eligible properties.

## Coverage

190+ countries · 2 million+ hotels · All luxury segments from boutique to 5-star resorts

## For Travelers

Luxvibe is built for travelers seeking premium hotel experiences. Whether planning a luxury getaway, business trip, or romantic escape, find and book the perfect high-end accommodation with confidence.

## Website

https://luxvibe.io

## Contact

bookings@luxvibe.io
